nasb.text: (Now this expression, “He ascended,” what does it mean except that He also had descended into the lower parts of the earth?

esv.text: (In saying, “He ascended,” what does it mean but that he had also descended into the lower regions, the earth?

ccb.text: 既然说“升上”，岂不表示祂曾经降到地上吗？

csbs.text: 那么“他升上”这话是什么意思呢？难道不也是说他曾降到地的低层吗？
